ats: LinkedIn Easy Apply (may route to external)
sponsorship_note: No explicit mention of sponsorship policy in JD. Nielsen is a 15,000+ global media/analytics firm with LCA history — KEEP as viable. Not a hard stop.
jd_summary: Nielsen seeks a Change Management Specialist to support organizational transformation. Role focuses on executing change management plans, stakeholder engagement, communications, training coordination, and adoption measurement for technology and process initiatives.

key_points.one_liner: OCM/change practitioner role executing change plans, stakeholder comms, and training coordination for tech/process transformations at Nielsen.
key_points.years_experience_asked: 2-5 years in tech project management, change management, training, or technical transformation
key_points.sponsorship_signal: No explicit no-sponsorship language. Nielsen global firm — treat as viable (keep)
